title: REKO RING / FINLAND
subtitle: GET INSPIRED! A ROADMAP TO REPLICATE KNOWLEDGE AND EXPERIENCE ABOUT FAIR FOOD SUPPLY CHAINS
description: A roadmap for replicating the Finnish REKO Ring model, which uses pre-ordered direct sales via Facebook to support small-scale organic farmers and connect them with consumers. It details the system’s structure, funding, participant roles, benefits, and key success factors for fair local food supply chains.
